title: The Hidden Cost of a Big Heart:  Understanding Emotional Burnout
description: Emotional burnout often affects empathetic individuals who constantly give without setting boundaries. From a mental health counsellor’s perspective, learn the signs, causes, and practical ways to protect your energy, set healthy limits, and recover while maintaining emotional balance.
